description: 抖音图文发布流程（v1.7.5：修复图片上传等待——用 wait_for_selector 等待缩略图 + 关闭共创中心弹窗 + 发布前图片存在性检查）

steps.descript: 导航到抖音图文上传页
等待进入上传页
等待上传组件加载完成

steps.selector: //input[@type='file' and (@accept='image/*' or contains(@accept,'image'))] | //input[@type='file' and contains(@class,'image')] | //div[contains(@class,'image-upload')]//input[@type='file'] | //input[@type='file' and not(contains(@accept,'video'))]
steps.descript: 上传图片（封面图）- 精确匹配图片 input，排除视频 input
steps.ai_intent: 找到抖音图文上传图片的文件选择按钮（注意不要选到视频上传 input）

steps.descript: 等待图片开始上传（setInputFiles 触发后给浏览器 2 秒读取文件）

steps.value: const sleep = (ms) => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); const start = Date.now(); let lastInfo = null; while (Date.now() - start < 30000) { const imgs = document.querySelectorAll('.image-item img, .upload-item img, .image-container img, [class*="image"][class*="item"] img, [class*="upload"] img, div[class*="image"] img'); const progressBars = document.querySelectorAll('.progress-bar, .uploading, [class*="progress"], [class*="loading"], [class*="uploading"]'); const visibleImgs = Array.from(imgs).filter(i => { const r = i.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 30 && r.height > 30; }); const visibleProgress = Array.from(progressBars).filter(p => { const r = p.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; }); lastInfo = { imgCount: visibleImgs.length, progressCount: visibleProgress.length, elapsed: Math.round((Date.now() - start) / 1000) }; if (visibleImgs.length > 0 && visibleProgress.length === 0) { return { ok: true, ...lastInfo }; } await sleep(1000); } return { ok: false, ...lastInfo, reason: '等待 30 秒后图片仍未上传完成' };
steps.descript: 等待图片上传完成（轮询检测缩略图出现 + 进度条消失，最多 30 秒）

steps.value: const imgs = document.querySelectorAll('.image-item img, .upload-item img, .image-container img, [class*="image"][class*="item"] img, [class*="upload"] img, div[class*="image"] img'); const visible = Array.from(imgs).filter(i => { const r = i.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 30 && r.height > 30; }); const info = visible.map(i => ({ src: (i.src||'').slice(0, 80), w: Math.round(i.getBoundingClientRect().width), h: Math.round(i.getBoundingClientRect().height) })); return { count: visible.length, images: info.slice(0, 5) };
steps.descript: 调试：列出页面上所有可见的已上传图片（src/尺寸）

steps.value: const dialogs = document.querySelectorAll('.semi-modal-content, [role="dialog"], .semi-modal'); for (const d of dialogs) { const r = d.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width > 0 && r.height > 0) { const btns = d.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"]'); for (const b of btns) { const t = (b.innerText||b.textContent||'').trim(); if (t.includes('我知道了') || t.includes('知道了') || t.includes('确定') || t === '×' || t === '关闭') { b.click(); return { closed: true, btnText: t }; } } } } return { closed: false, reason: '无弹窗或未找到关闭按钮' };
steps.descript: 关闭「共创中心」弹窗（点击我知道了/确定/×）
等待弹窗关闭动画
填写标题
steps.ai_intent: 找到抖音标题输入框并填写

steps.descript: 等待标题渲染完成
在「添加作品描述」编辑器中填入正文（contenteditable 富文本，press 长字符串自动转 execContent 剪贴板粘贴）
steps.ai_intent: 找到抖音「添加作品描述」富文本编辑区并填入正文内容

steps.descript: 等待正文渲染完成
添加话题（每个话题回车确认）
等待话题渲染完成
位置选择分支
商品链接分支
等待表单稳定

steps.value: const imgs = document.querySelectorAll('.image-item img, .upload-item img, .image-container img, [class*="image"][class*="item"] img, [class*="upload"] img, div[class*="image"] img'); const visible = Array.from(imgs).filter(i => { const r = i.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 30 && r.height > 30; }); const dialogs = document.querySelectorAll('.semi-modal-content, [role="dialog"]'); const visibleDialogs = Array.from(dialogs).filter(d => { const r = d.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; }); return { imageCount: visible.length, hasDialog: visibleDialogs.length > 0, dialogCount: visibleDialogs.length };
steps.descript: 发布前最终检查：图片数量 + 弹窗状态

steps.value: const btns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], .btn-primary, .btn-publish')); const visible = btns.filter(b => { const r = b.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; }); const info = visible.map(b => ({ tag: b.tagName, text: (b.innerText||b.textContent||'').trim().slice(0,30), cls: b.className, disabled: b.disabled, rect: { x: Math.round(b.getBoundingClientRect().x), y: Math.round(b.getBoundingClientRect().y) } })); return info;
steps.descript: 调试：列出页面上所有可见按钮（text/class/坐标）

steps.value: const btns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], .btn-primary, .btn-publish, div[class*="publish"] button')); const visible = btns.filter(b => { const r = b.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 0 && r.height > 0 && !b.disabled; }); const text = b => (b.innerText||b.textContent||'').trim(); const isDraft = b => /草稿|存为草稿|存草稿/.test(text(b)); const isPublish = b => /^发布$|^直接发布$|^高清发布$/.test(text(b)) || (text(b).includes('发布') && !isDraft(b) && text(b).length <= 6); const candidates = visible.filter(b => isPublish(b) && !isDraft(b)); if (candidates.length === 0) { return { ok: false, reason: '未找到发布按钮', all: visible.map(b => ({text: text(b).slice(0,30), cls: b.className})) }; } const preferred = candidates.find(b => /btn-primary|primary|publish/.test(b.className)) || candidates[0]; try { preferred.click(); } catch(e) { preferred.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, view: window })); } return { ok: true, clicked: { text: text(preferred), cls: preferred.className, tag: preferred.tagName }, candidateCount: candidates.length, all: candidates.map(b => ({text: text(b).slice(0,30), cls: b.className})) };
steps.descript: 用 JS 精准定位发布按钮并点击（支持「高清发布」，排除保存草稿按钮）
等待发布按钮点击响应

steps.value: const url = window.location.href; const hasDialog = !!document.querySelector('.semi-modal-content, [role="dialog"]'); const dialogText = hasDialog ? (document.querySelector('.semi-modal-content, [role="dialog"]')?.innerText||'').slice(0,200) : ''; const errorMsg = (document.querySelector('.toast-error, .error-msg, .semi-toast-content')?.innerText||'').slice(0,200); return { url, hasDialog, dialogText, errorMsg };
steps.descript: 调试：点击发布按钮后检查页面状态（URL/弹窗/错误）
等待发布成功跳转到内容管理页
获取发布后 URL
